{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Knight-Adjunct
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is a [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
